verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Truehearted, wholehearted, faithful and loyal King of our lives, by Thy grace we will be; Under the standard exalted and royal Strong in Thy strength we will battle for Thee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Peal out the watchworld! Silence it never! Song of our spirits, rejoicing and free; Peal out the watchworld! Loyal forever! King of our lives, by Thy grace we will be.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Truehearted, wholehearted, fullest allegiance Yielding henceforth to our glorious King Valiant endeavor and loving obedience Freely and joyously now would we bring

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Truehearted, wholehearted, Savior all glorious! Take thy great power and reign there alone, Over our wills and affections victorious Freely surrendered and wholy thine own.
